Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Parse only explicit date and content variants, keep original values, and reject or quarantine ambiguity without silent invention.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Date Content Variance model · Theory Feed Ts Dat…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Date.parse accepts every meaningful syndication date correctly.
